heading: Exoneration and limitation
label: 30910 Exoneration and limitation
text: The United States is entitled to the exemptions from and limitations of liability provided by law to an owner, charterer, operator, or agent of a vessel.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3091046 App.:746., .Mar. 9, 1920, ch. 95, § 641 Stat. 527
